[semantic.contract-result-context] Error: `result` is only available inside `ensures` clauses
   ╭─[ examples/invalid/contract_failures.sarif:1:37 ]
   │
 1 │ fn main(flag: Bool) -> I32 requires result ensures result + flag { 3 }
   │                                     ───┬──  
   │                                        ╰──── `result` is only available inside `ensures` clauses
   │ 
   │ Help: Use local bindings or parameters instead.
───╯
[semantic.binary-type] Error: operands of `+` must both be `I32`, both be `F64`, or append to `TextBuilder`, found `I32` and `Bool`
   ╭─[ examples/invalid/contract_failures.sarif:1:52 ]
   │
 1 │ fn main(flag: Bool) -> I32 requires result ensures result + flag { 3 }
   │                                                    ──────┬──────  
   │                                                          ╰──────── operands of `+` must both be `I32`, both be `F64`, or append to `TextBuilder`, found `I32` and `Bool`
   │ 
   │ Help: Use matching numeric operand types for arithmetic.
───╯
check failed
